name: Poplar Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Poplar Jewelry & Loan operates two Maryland pawn shops offering collateral-based loans, jewelry/gold buying, and merchandise sales without credit checks since 1995.
description_long:
Poplar Jewelry & Loan was established in 1995 and has spent over 24 years serving working families and communities across the Baltimore metropolitan area. The company operates two physical locations in Parkville and Dundalk, Maryland, positioning itself as a modernized alternative to traditional pawn shops with emphasis on customer service and a friendly atmosphere.

The company offers pawn loans as its core service—allowing customers to pledge valuable items as collateral for quick cash without credit checks or impact to credit scores. Beyond lending, they buy jewelry, gold, diamonds, and watches outright. They also operate a layaway service, sell merchandise through both their retail locations and multiple eBay storefronts (W & B Collection, WB Pawn, and Poplar Jewelry), and accept a broad range of collateral including electronics, musical instruments, tools, designer handbags, watches, gaming systems, bicycles, and other valuables.

Poplar Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through its emphasis on hassle-free transactions, confidential service, budget-friendly pricing, and a customer-centric shopping experience. They've invested in mobile payment infrastructure through the MobilePawn app, allowing customers to manage loan payments, layaways, and balances digitally. Customer testimonials highlight friendly staff, above-and-beyond service, and value across both pawning and purchasing.

As a pawn shop, the business model inherently involves higher interest rates typical of collateral-based lending and carries the standard risk of asset forfeiture if loans aren't repaid. While the company emphasizes affordability and accessibility for underbanked populations, pawn loans remain a high-cost borrowing option compared to traditional credit products. The company's long operational history and dual-location presence suggest stability, though they remain a niche financial services provider rather than a comprehensive credit solution.
pros: No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to those with poor or no credit history
No impact to credit score from pawn loans or missed payments
Quick cash availability without lengthy approval processes
Operates 2 locations (Parkville and Dundalk) plus 3 active eBay storefronts for merchandise access
Accepts broad range of collateral (jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, designer items, watches, gaming systems)
Mobile payment app (MobilePawn) for convenient loan and layaway management
Established business (since 1995) with 24+ years of operational history
Offers multiple services (pawn loans, buying, selling, layaway) in one location
cons: Pawn loans carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional personal loans or credit options
Risk of losing pledged collateral if loan is not repaid by maturity date
Limited to two Maryland locations; not accessible to customers outside Parkville and Dundalk areas
Website does not disclose specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms, requiring in-person or phone inquiry
Pawn loans are short-term solutions; not suitable for long-term financing needs
best_for: Individuals with poor credit or no credit history needing emergency cash without a credit check
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who prefer selling or using them as collateral rather than applying for traditional loans
Customers in the Parkville and Dundalk, Maryland area seeking budget-friendly merchandise or layaway options
Those seeking quick cash in a financial pinch who can meet short-term repayment obligations
diagnosis: Poplar Jewelry & Loan is best for Maryland residents in Parkville or Dundalk who need immediate cash and have valuable collateral they can pledge, or those with damaged credit seeking to buy discounted merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term borrowing tools—interest rates are high and collateral is forfeited if not repaid—so they should only be used for genuine emergency situations, not regular financing needs.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based lending without credit checks)
Diamond and watch appraisals and purchasing
Electronic device buying and selling (TVs, stereos, laptops, tablets, gaming systems)
Musical instrument pawning and sales (including Fender guitars)
Designer handbag and luxury item buying
Retail merchandise sales across two physical locations
eBay storefront sales (W & B Collection, WB Pawn, Poplar Jewelry)
Mobile payment processing via MobilePawn app
